burden.dalyPerCapita: indirect; linked to falls and adverse drug events

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Medication count with assessment using Beers/STOPP-START and medication reconciliation

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: variable; medication review programs exist in many systems

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Medication review often integrated in primary care and pharmacy services
